\tzpentry{ID5790}{Charge Magnetic Field Curl Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5790 introduces Charge Magnetic Field Curl Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \exists\,(\nabla \times (\rho_{\mathrm{charge}}\,\mathbf{v}) \neq 0)\ \wedge\ (\nabla \cdot \mathbf{v} \neq 0) \;\Longrightarrow\; \frac{\partial \mathbf{B}}{\partial t} = \nabla \times (\mathbf{v} \times \mathbf{B}) . \]
